contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 20
- Description: Advisory Operations health: Brazil→SF supply pipeline + cash float for the daily oracle
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/77
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/78
  
  Details:
  Extended `market_research/scripts/generate_advisory_snapshot.py` with an "Operations health" section so the daily oracle / advisor can finally see the Brazil → SF supply pipeline + cash float. Pain point that motivated this: Kirsten's SF stock goes low *before* Matheus's next freight inbound has arrived, and the advisory had no signal — neither stock breakdown nor cash visibility.
  
  ## What landed (#77 + #78)
  
  1. **New "Operations health" markdown section** in `ADVISORY_SNAPSHOT.md` and a structured snapshot at `ecosystem_change_logs/ops_health/current.json` (+ dated history) — one source of truth for both the oracle prompt and a future dapp dashboard page.
  2. **Always-on (no auth)**: per-shipper stock for Kirsten / Matheus / Gary Teh from `treasury-cache/dao_offchain_treasury.json`, rolled up by the new `inventory_type` × `unit_format` fields. Slim summary for the 35+ other consigned-partner managers.
  3. **With `--with-sheet-sales`**: cash float (USD on hand, BRL on hand, USD provisions for voting-rights cash-out) from `off chain asset balance`, and in-transit freight from `Shipment Ledger Listing` (status keyword filter; Wix HTML stripped).
  4. **Bug-fix follow-up (#78)**: three silent column-mapping bugs surfaced during smoke testing — `_find_header_col`'s fuzzy substring fallback was misfiring on (a) Currencies tab where `name` matched `farm name`, (b) off chain asset balance where row 1 is a `Physical Assets` title not real headers, (c) Shipment Ledger Listing where `shipment` matched `shipment date` and swapped IDs/dates. Introduced `_exact_col` (strict-only) and `_find_header_row` helpers for the new code paths.
  5. **Bonus simplification**: `off chain asset balance` already carries USD-per-BRL on the BRL row's `Unit Value` column, so we use that as the FX source and skip the cross-tab dependency on `Currencies`.
  
  ## Verified live (post-fix)
  
  - Kirsten 18 SKU lines / 1,262 units · Matheus 22 / 2,012 · Gary 28 / 11,536
  - USD on hand: $2,436.29
  - BRL on hand: R$2,511.97 · rate 0.2323 USD/BRL → ≈ $583.53 USD equivalent
  - Voting-rights cash-out provisions: $32.94
  - In-transit shipment ID `AGL7` (was empty before the column-lookup fix)
  - 74 cash-float rows captured
  
  ## Architecture decision
  
  Burn rate / days-of-cover is intentionally v2 — needs a sales × `inventory_type` join, and `inventory_type` is currently populated on ~28% of items. The JSON snapshot reserves `sales_velocity_30d` / `days_of_cover_at_sf` slots so a dapp dashboard can be wired against the schema today and back-filled when the inventory_type column is more complete.
  
  ## Pull requests
  
  - TrueSightDAO/go_to_market — https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/77 (ops-health v1)
  - TrueSightDAO/go_to_market — https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/78 (header-lookup bug fixes)
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 33.33
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
